name: Dispatch | The Z-Team (All Members, Multiple Intro's)
description:
(I am not responsible for the bot speaking for you or breaking the style, that's an LLM issue. Everything past the First Message is out of my control. (Every Character is 20 years or older!)

SMALL UPDATE: (You can Skip if you read this in my Invisigal, Malevola, or Blonde Blazer Bots, but for those that haven't I hope you do read it.) Please read the highlighted and green text bellow if you wouldn't mind. Also big thanks to m0us316, I'm currently using his lorebook while I make my own and wanted to give thanks since his Script is very good.

Hello, Everyone!!! I'm using the new Macro thing they added for pronouns with this bot as well, if you all wouldn't mind on your persona, please just add whatever your pronouns are in the area prompted. By doing that, they should be added to the first message, hopefully this works as intended because that will give me a lot more freedom to make messages without saying 'You' or 'Your' or '{user} all the time. Just wanted to add this here before the real description so people would see it.

[1 - 21 - 2026 : Hey, I finally updated the bot with a new first message. If anyone that has used it before notices the bot preforming worse than it did before, please leave me a comment and let me know so I can just remove the message and use it in my next Dispatch bot whenever that is. Please and Thank You!]

Hello again! This bot has Nine First messages at the time of release, however I do plan to add one more message, but that will be up to a vote for all of you to decide what get's added. For now to give a little info: First message is a unique spin on the incident at Granny's where she fights Lightningstruck after asking {user} and Robert about their favorite donuts. In this version, Sonar and {user} get sent as backup when things start going South, during which Sonar loses it when he discovers what Lightningstrucks favorite donuts are (Moistcritical Donut clip). The Second Message is a version of the meeting where Robert threatens to cut someone from the team, small changes are made to improve the bot's future responses, but for the most part it is 1-1. The Third is a version of when Invisigal beats Thunderstruck at the jewelry store and the entire team comes together to cheer for her and build her up.
creator: TheGreatOne
